text: The highest and best use analysis considered the property both as though vacant and as improved. As improved, the property’s functional attributes, permitted zoning, and physical layout are well suited to continued use as a retail/service commercial facility. Its current configuration,location within Danvers’ village core, and compatibility with surrounding development support ongoing retail/service occupancy, which is also consistent with local demand and prevailing use patterns. Commercial property values in the area are underpinned by stable, practical uses, rather than speculative or redevelopment-based demand; therefore, continued use as a retail/service property represents the highest and best use as improved.
